_comment: Oracle Forge — Claude Desktop MCP configuration
1. Open Claude Desktop → Settings → Developer → Edit Config
2. Merge the 'mcpServers' block below into your claude_desktop_config.json
3. Adjust the 'cwd' path to your oracle-forge checkout
pip install mcp[cli] psycopg2-binary pymongo duckdb pyyaml pandas python-dotenv
(or run the MCP server via Docker — see docker-compose.yml oracle-mcp service)
